care.summary: A trailing succulent with densely packed, plump blue-green leaves, perfect for hanging baskets.
care.light: Bright indirect to direct light; south or west window ideal
care.water: Water thoroughly when soil is completely dry; very drought tolerant
care.soil: Very well-draining cactus/succulent mix with extra perlite or coarse sand
care.fertilizer: Dilute succulent fertilizer once in spring and once in summer
common_issues: Leaves fall off easily from handling or bumping
Rot from overwatering or poor drainage
Etiolation with widely spaced leaves in low light
tips: Handle as little as possible — leaves are extremely fragile
Use a hanging basket to show off its trailing habit
Reduce watering to near-dry in winter
Propagate by laying fallen leaves on dry succulent mix
